article_title: 迭代器模式 C# 实战：分页数据访问的完整实现
core_theme: 用 C# 迭代器模式把分页数据访问封装成普通的 foreach 循环，让消费者不再关心分页机制
reader_takeaway: 学会用 IEnumerable<T> 和 IAsyncEnumerable<T> 构建透明的分页数据访问层，直接从项目中复用
summary_angle: 从「手动分页循环又乱又难维护」到「foreach 一行搞定，分页自动透明」，核心是一层 IEnumerable<T> 封装

information_blocks.source_anchor: 第一节：手动 while-true-fetch-break 循环，每个消费者都要重复分页逻辑，需求变更时所有地方都要改
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧散落的多个相同循环代码片段，暗示重复劳动和混乱

information_blocks.source_anchor: 第二节：PaginatedEnumerable<T> 封装分页抓取，委托解耦数据源
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央一个统一的传送带/管道结构，代表迭代器的封装层，数据块从底部自动送入

information_blocks.source_anchor: 第五节：foreach 一行遍历，LINQ .Where()/.Select() 直接组合，仓储返回 IEnumerable<T> 即可
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧一个简洁的 foreach 循环图标，连带着 LINQ 链式操作的视觉暗示

information_blocks.source_anchor: 第七节/总结：内存高效，百万级记录场景适用，消费者无需改动
information_blocks.visual_idea: 底部或角落展示一个内存节省的对比图标，大量数据流经但内存占用很小

main_metaphor: 传送带流水线，数据像货物从源头经过迭代器封装层自动送上消费者的 foreach 工作台
primary_subject: 一个整洁的 C# 迭代器传送带装置，数据块从底部被自动送入，右侧 foreach 消费者简单取用
subject_action: 迭代器装置正在自动推进数据块，消费者只需在终点用 foreach 接住
composition: 左右对照：左侧混乱的手动循环 vs 右侧干净的 foreach 流水线，中央是迭代器封装层做桥梁
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: bright family-animation feeling, rounded character shapes, clear emotional acting, polished color and lighting, no studio imitation
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中（index 23/40）
style_safety_note: 原风格名强指向迪士尼品牌，最终 prompt 只使用明亮动画感、圆润造型、清晰表现力、精致色彩与光照等非仿冒描述
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证主题（传送带+foreach迭代）、构图（左右对比）、信息块可读性
revision_targets: 如果左侧代码片段太具体像真实截图就简化
如果传送带变成真实工厂流水线就回到抽象概念图
如果有迪士尼角色出现就清除
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Using C# Iterator Pattern to wrap paginated data access into a transparent foreach loop. The reader should quickly feel this is a practical pattern that replaces messy manual pagination with clean, composable code.

Summary angle: From 'manual while-true-fetch-break loops everywhere' to 'foreach handles everything, pagination is transparent' — the key is one layer of IEnumerable<T> encapsulation.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- problem: Manual pagination loops repeated across consumers, tangled with business logic
- mechanism: PaginatedEnumerable<T> wraps page fetching via delegate, decoupling data source
- evidence: Plain foreach + LINQ .Where()/.Select() work transparently over paginated data
- takeaway: Memory-efficient for millions of records, consumers never need to change

Main metaphor: A clean conveyor-belt pipeline where data blocks move from a data source through an iterator encapsulation layer to a foreach workstation.
Subject: A tidy C# iterator conveyor mechanism, data blocks being automatically advanced, with a foreach consumer at the right side. No real characters or people.
Composition/framing: Left-right contrast — chaotic repeated manual loops on the left vs clean foreach pipeline on the right, with the iterator encapsulation as the bridge in center. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: bright family-animation feeling, rounded character shapes, clear emotional acting, polished color and lighting, no studio imitation. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep blue background, warm orange highlights, white technical elements, light gray accents.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-4 short Chinese labels from the information blocks: '手动分页循环', 'IEnumerable<T>', 'foreach + LINQ', '内存高效'. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: code rain, neon skylines, cyberpunk purple-blue lighting, floating chips, generic robots, HUD overlays, fake UI interfaces, fake dashboards, Disney characters.
